brokers.fallback: disable clipboard integration for WebContent child processes
brokers.userVisibleImpact: Copy and paste may be unavailable inside sandboxed web content.
brokers.remediationHint: Route pasteboard access through the desktop broker and require user gesture gating.

brokers.userVisibleImpact: Browser child process cannot directly register with host desktop services.
brokers.remediationHint: Move host desktop service calls into a parent-process broker.

brokers.fallback: quarantine extension discovery for this launch transaction
brokers.userVisibleImpact: Extensions are disabled until registry integrity is verified.
brokers.remediationHint: Rebuild or refresh the extension registry before enabling extension discovery.

userVisibleSummary: Desktop service brokers are degraded for BearBrowser, so child-process desktop access must remain brokered or disabled.
remediationHint: Verify pasteboard, CoreServices, and extension-registry brokers before spawning WebContent.
